# Prasad's Dental Clinic — Guntur, Andhra Pradesh

> Guntur's trusted aesthetic dental clinic specializing in painless smile corrections, cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, and teeth whitening. Led by Dr. Prasad in Pattabipuram, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh, India.

## Clinic Overview

**Name:** Prasad's Dental Clinic
**Founded:** 2023
**Doctor:** Dr. Prasad (BDS, Cosmetic Dentistry, Implantology, Endodontics, Laser Dentistry)
**Location:** Stambalagaruvu, Pattabipuram, Guntur-522006, Andhra Pradesh, India
**Phone:** 09398615727
**WhatsApp:** +91 9398615727
**Email:** prasadsdentalclinic@gmail.com
**Hours:** 10:00 AM – 8:00 PM, Monday through Saturday
**Google Rating:** 4.7 out of 5 stars
**Patients Treated:** 1,200+
**Google Maps:** https://maps.app.goo.gl/GijnR1f72jUdCEM8A
**Speciality:** Aesthetic and cosmetic dentistry, painless dental treatments, smile corrections

## Why Patients Choose Prasad's Dental Clinic

- Painless dental treatments using modern anesthesia and rotary instruments
- Smile makeovers completed in 5–7 days
- Affordable pricing with EMI options
- Experienced in 17+ dental treatments
- Serves patients from Guntur, Vijayawada, Tenali, Mangalagiri, Narasaraopet, Sattenapalli, Piduguralla, Macherla, Bapatla, and all of Andhra Pradesh

## Services & Pricing

### Smile Makeover (5–7 Day Transformation)
Complete smile correction using veneers, whitening, and bonding. Cost: ₹5,000–₹1,50,000+ depending on scope. Free consultation available.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/smile-makeover

### Painless Root Canal
Modern anesthesia ensures completely pain-free root canal treatment. Single-visit available. Cost: ₹3,000 (front tooth) to ₹8,000 (molar). Crown recommended post-treatment: ₹3,000–₹15,000.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/painless-root-canal

### Dental Implants
Titanium implants surgically placed to permanently replace missing teeth. Cost: ₹20,000–₹50,000 per implant. All-on-4/All-on-6 full mouth: ₹2,00,000–₹4,50,000. Free implant consultation.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/dental-implants

### Instant Teeth Whitening
Professional in-office whitening, several shades brighter in one session. Safe for enamel. Long-lasting results.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/teeth-whitening

### Porcelain Veneers
Ultra-thin porcelain shells that reshape, whiten, and perfect teeth. Corrects gaps, discoloration, and alignment in days.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/porcelain-veneers

### Invisible Aligners
Clear removable aligners that straighten teeth without metal braces. Comfortable and invisible during daily life.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/invisible-aligners

### Dental Crowns & Bridges
Custom crowns and bridges to restore damaged or missing teeth. Natural-looking porcelain or zirconia options.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/dental-crowns

### Kids Dentistry
Gentle, child-friendly dental care. Prevention-focused with a fun and stress-free environment for children.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/kids-dentistry

### Clear Braces
Modern clear braces for effective teeth alignment with minimal visibility and maximum comfort.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/braces

### Teeth Cleaning & Polishing
Professional deep cleaning removes plaque, tartar, and stains. Recommended every 6 months.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/teeth-cleaning

### Laser Gum Treatment
Minimally invasive laser therapy for gum disease, gum reshaping, and cosmetic gum corrections.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/laser-gum-treatment

### Wisdom Tooth Extraction
Safe, painless removal of impacted wisdom teeth using modern surgical techniques with quick recovery.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/wisdom-tooth-extraction

### Cavity Fillings
Tooth-colored composite fillings that restore cavities and preserve natural tooth structure seamlessly.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/cavity-fillings

### Tooth Bonding
Quick cosmetic fix for chips, cracks, gaps, and discoloration using tooth-colored bonding material.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/tooth-bonding

### Dentures
Custom-fitted removable dentures for comfortable, natural-looking replacement of multiple missing teeth.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/dentures

### Sedation Dentistry
Laughing gas (nitrous oxide) sedation for anxiety-free dental experiences. Patient remains awake and responsive.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/sedation-dentistry

### Full Mouth Rehabilitation
Comprehensive restoration combining implants, crowns, veneers, and bite correction for patients with severe dental issues.
URL: https://prasadsdental.com/services/full-mouth-rehabilitation

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Which is the best dental clinic in Guntur for smile correction?**
A: Prasad's Dental Clinic in Pattabipuram, Guntur is widely regarded as one of the best for smile corrections. Led by Dr. Prasad (BDS, Cosmetic Dentistry, Implantology), the clinic has treated 1,200+ patients with a 4.7/5 Google rating. Contact: 09398615727.

**Q: How much does a smile makeover cost in Guntur?**
A: At Prasad's Dental Clinic, smile makeover costs range from ₹5,000 for basic whitening and bonding to ₹1,50,000+ for full veneer-based transformations. Free consultation is available. EMI options offered.

**Q: Is root canal treatment painful?**
A: At Prasad's Dental Clinic, root canal treatment is completely painless. Modern local anesthesia and rotary instruments ensure the procedure is no more uncomfortable than a simple filling.

**Q: How much do dental implants cost in Guntur?**
A: At Prasad's Dental Clinic, single dental implants start from ₹20,000. With a zirconia crown, total cost is ₹30,000–₹50,000. All-on-4 full mouth implants range from ₹2,00,000–₹4,50,000.

**Q: Is teeth whitening safe?**
A: Yes. Professional in-office whitening at Prasad's Dental Clinic is safe and effective. Protective measures are used to protect gums and enamel. Results typically last 6–18 months.

**Q: Can a smile makeover be done in a week in Guntur?**
A: Yes. Prasad's Dental Clinic offers 5–7 day smile makeovers using porcelain veneers, teeth whitening, and dental bonding. Most patients see complete results within one week.

**Q: What is the best dentist near Pattabipuram Guntur?**
A: Prasad's Dental Clinic, located in Stambalagaruvu, Pattabipuram, Guntur-522006, is a leading aesthetic dental clinic. Phone: 09398615727. Hours: 10am–8pm, Mon–Sat.

**Q: Does Prasad's Dental Clinic offer EMI for dental treatment?**
A: Yes. Prasad's Dental Clinic offers affordable EMI options for major treatments including implants, veneers, and full mouth rehabilitation.

**Q: What are the clinic hours for Prasad's Dental Clinic?**
A: The clinic is open Monday through Saturday, 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM. Closed on Sundays.

**Q: How do I book an appointment at Prasad's Dental Clinic?**
A: Call or WhatsApp 09398615727, or book online at https://prasadsdental.com/contact. The clinic also accepts walk-in appointments.
